theme: Porto: The underrated gem for corporate groups

linkedin.text:
Porto is the most underrated destination for corporate groups in Europe. Convince me otherwise.

We've been routing more groups through Porto in the last 18 months. Here's why it's becoming our go-to recommendation for teams of 30-80:

🏰 The experience is unique: Wine caves from the 1600s that you can dine in. Ribeira waterfront that changes personality from day to afternoon to evening. Ceramic tile workshops that become unforgettable team activities.

🍷 The product: Port wine experience (exclusive tastings at historic lodges), Francesinha at legendary spots, fresh Atlantic fish. Foodies in your group will talk about this trip for years.

✈️ The logistics: 3.5h from Tel Aviv. 1-2h from London, Madrid, Paris. Ryanair, Vueling, and TAP cover most European markets directly. No complex transit.

💰 The economics: Porto is 25-35% more cost-efficient than Lisbon for the same quality tier. Boutique hotels under €150/night. Michelin-adjacent restaurants at €50/person.

🎯 The exclusivity factor: Your team hasn't been to Porto. This matters more than you'd think. Novelty drives engagement.

Our last Porto group: 45 people, fintech company, 4 nights. Average satisfaction: 9.4/10. Two executives extended their stay.

The right client for Porto: wants authentic culture, not a beach resort. Appreciates food and wine. Is tired of Barcelona (it happens).

Sound like your group?

📩 alon@upe.co.il | 🌐 upe.co.il

#Porto #IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #Portugal #EventPlanning #UproductionEvents #MICE #CorporateTravel #Destinations #TeamBuilding #EventROI
